message:
refactor: comprehensive code quality pass — struct alignment, error handling, import ordering, idle detection, and redaction optimization

This commit encompasses a broad code quality improvement across 207 files
(2480 insertions, 1924 deletions) touching nearly every package in the
codebase.

Formatting and alignment:
- Align struct field tags and map literals to consistent column widths
  across config, ensemble, cost, serve, and robot packages
- Remove trailing blank lines and fix inconsistent whitespace
- Reorder imports to group standard library, third-party, and internal
  packages per Go conventions (serve/server.go, etc.)
- Remove unused trailing newlines in parser.go and other files

Error handling improvements:
- Handle previously-ignored return values from WebSocket conn.Close(),
  SetReadDeadline(), SetWriteDeadline(), and WriteMessage() in
  serve/server.go readPump/writePump with proper error logging
- Handle Close() errors in doctor API health check probe connections
- Add bounds check for agents array index in robot.go assignAgentsToPanes
  to prevent potential out-of-range panics

Feature additions:
- robot.go: add Python REPL prompt detection (">>>") to idle state
  determination via isPythonPrompt(), integrated into isIdlePrompt()
  and isPromptLine() for all agent types
- robot.go: refactor generateContextHints to use switch statement
  instead of if-else chain for cleaner control flow
- redaction.go: add literal prefilter optimization via
  passesLiteralPrefilter() to skip expensive regex evaluation when
  the input string doesn't contain required literal substrings
- cli/root.go: fix SendOptions.Redaction field path (was nested under
  SendOptions, now directly on opts)
- robot.go: fix CASS status timestamp access (drop .Time indirection)
- serve/server.go: close resource properly in performDoctorCheckAPI
- dashboard.go: simplify formatPaneLabel with direct TrimPrefix
- workflow/loader.go: add missing import

Test improvements:
- Update test expectations across e2e/, internal/cli/, internal/serve/,
  internal/ensemble/, internal/robot/ to match new struct layouts and
  error handling behavior
- Fix test helper alignment in multiple _test.go files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
